chunks.title: Bones Spread to the Heavens
chunks.reason: Oracle describing the desecration of Judah's dead and the preference for death over life.

chunks.title: Judgment on Faithlessness and False Wisdom
chunks.reason: Argument contrasting human faithlessness with natural order, criticizing scribes and priests, and predicting loss of harvest.

chunks.title: Dialogue on the Oncoming Enemy and Despair
chunks.reason: Dialogue between the people acknowledging their sin and the prophet describing the invasion and divine judgment.

chunks.title: Lament for the Broken Daughter
chunks.reason: Speech of Jeremiah expressing personal grief and asking about the lack of healing.
